backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages services (CRUD operations) and business info for Bodyshape Fitness, including blob storage mixin integration and hardcoded business details for Dallas, TX location.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the replacement of a distorted manager photo in Home.tsx with a newly uploaded image (556973191_25294936933424537_2300403285239686172_n.jpg).
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files, documenting components, pages, and configuration for the Bodyshape Fitness React application with updated branding, locations, and imagery.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with OKLCH color system using true red accent colors (hue 25-30) for fitness branding, supporting both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags and title for Bodyshape Fitness personal training in Dallas, TX.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component configuring TanStack Router with routes for Home and Locations pages wrapped in a Layout component.
Background music player component with play/pause, mute, and volume controls that persists user preferences to localStorage and plays royalty-free workout music from Bensound.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: Interactive image gallery component displaying 12 gym facility photos in a responsive grid with hover effects and modal dialog for enlarged views.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with Bodyshape Fitness branding, responsive navigation with mobile menu, BackgroundMusic integration, and footer showing Independence, Kentucky location details with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LocationCard.tsx: React component that displays a gym location's details (name, address, phone, hours) in a card layout with icons from lucide-react.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: React component that renders a grid of customer reviews with star ratings, displaying testimonials from the reviews data file.
frontend/src/data/reviews.ts: TypeScript data file containing an array of 6 customer reviews with reviewer names, ratings, review text, and dates.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor, handling authentication state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file for React Query hooks that would interact with the backend; currently exports nothing.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, defining a fitness brand color scheme with red accents and custom font imports (Inter, Bebas Neue).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component featuring hero section, manager profile, 20th anniversary celebration, image gallery, and testimonials section for Bodyshape Fitness gym.
frontend/src/pages/Locations.tsx: Locations page component displaying gym address, contact information, hours, and an embedded Google Maps iframe for Bodyshape Fitness in Independence, KY.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom fonts (Inter, Bebas Neue), border radius variables, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file for Bodyshape Fitness gym website tracking architectural notes, known issues (incorrect business info, wrong location, placeholder content, pink instead of red colors), and existing features including homepage, image gallery, locations page, and visual design implementation.
